pending confirmation on viol-policy re "explain before acting"

13.explanation:
Fabric-Param: Agent tries search_rebooking _options but does not have the origin / destination airports, so it uses “?” as the input.
Viol-Policy: Agent does add_to_standby before explaining to / confirming with user.

14.explanation: Agent suggests user can "use email or phone number tied to the reservation" (Turn 2) and to "call SkyWay support and they can help you verify another way" (Turn 3).

15.explanation: oof! This is quite the unfaithful agent on this one!

17.explanation:
Fabric-Param: Agent gives LAX -> SEA as airports for first search_rebooking_options call but these were never provided. (Actually should be SFO > LAX)
Misrep-Output: Agent repeatedly gives incorrect flight times. E.g. in Turn 4,  Agent says "Flight SK130 – Departure at 11:00 AM" but rebook_option tool shows it departs at 3:30 pm. (Turn 4)
Viol-Policy: Agent tries to do a rebook_flight (Turn 7) when user only asks to get added to standby.
Halluc: all over the place :D E.g. final paragraph from Agent mentions "You’ll be prompt to cancel the one you board, if necessary." ?!?!
